guide_dialog.title: Guide
guide_dialog.description: Important instructions for proper application usage:
guide_dialog.rule1_text: Your recorded videos are saved locally in your browser's storage. This means they are only accessible from the browser you used to record (e.g., Google Chrome). Use the same browser to access your local records.
guide_dialog.rule2_text: To prevent accidental loss of your recordings due to clearing browser history, cache, or cookies, it is highly recommended to upload your videos to cloud storage as soon as possible after the test.
guide_dialog.rule3_text: When starting the test, select 'Entire Screen' in the pop-up window, check the 'Also share system audio' box, and click the 'Share' button. The exam will start after this.

superadmin_page.welcome_message: Welcome to the Super Admin control panel. Use this interface to manage users, view analytics, and monitor system health.
superadmin_page.user_management_desc: Manage user roles, block/unblock accounts, and view profile details.
superadmin_page.analytics_desc: View total income, user statistics, and storage usage across the platform.
superadmin_page.system_logs_desc: Monitor real-time system activity and debug logs.
superadmin_page.warning: ⚠️ Caution: Only users with 'developer' role can access this page.
